title: ARGive samplesheet row
description: One row per metagenome to (re)process. CSV header must match these property names. At minimum supply `accession`; reads are fetched from ENA. Optionally point at local FASTQ to skip fetching.

study.description: Study/project accession; resolved from ENA if omitted

fastq_1.description: Optional path/URL to R1 (or single-end) FASTQ. If set, ENA fetch is skipped.

fastq_2.description: Optional path/URL to R2 FASTQ for paired-end.

platform.description: Sequencing platform hint; controls long-read vs short-read branches.

single_end.description: Force single-end handling. Inferred from fastq_2 presence if omitted.
